name: switchbot
title: SwitchBot
description: Control SwitchBot devices using the official CLI
author: Ill

commands.name: switchbot
commands.title: SwitchBot
commands.description: SwitchBotデバイスをCLI経由で操作

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: SwitchBot CLI
preferences.description: @switchbot/openapi-cli の実行ファイルを選択してください。認証情報はCLI側で管理されます。

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
